In a rondeau over medium heat, add 1000 grams of the vinegar and all of the dark brown sugar and cook to disolve the sugar
Once the sugar is dissolved, let it reduce by half while stirring occasionally to avoid burning the sugar
Once reduced, add the remaining vinegar.  Reduce by half again.
Begin slowly incorporating the butter in tabs to mount, whisking in each tab over low heat.
After mounting butter, remove from heat.
Use a small immersion blender to blend in the xanthan gum until thickened to desired consistency.
Reserve to quart containers and cool in the blast chiller or ice bath.
Store in the cooler.
